applicability_notes: Single-dim (or tuple-dim) max reduction. Maps torch.max(x, dim=d, keepdim=k)[0] / torch.amax(x, dim=d, keepdim=k) to ttnn.max(x, dim=d, keepdim=k). Input must be TILE_LAYOUT with implicit tile padding filled (ttnn.fill_implicit_tile_padding) to avoid padding values polluting the reduction; ROW_MAJOR also accepted per unit tests.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: generic [N, ..., reduced_dim] test tensors, tile-aligned via fill_implicit_tile_padding
placement_observations.source: unit_test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default interleaved DRAM memory config, followed by ttnn.fill_implicit_tile_padding before ttnn.max(input_tensor, dim=dim)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: attention scores row [batch, heads, seq_q, seq_k] with seq_k >= 4096
placement_observations.source: call_site safe_softmax: fused ttnn.softmax used when x.shape[dim] < 4096; otherwise decomposed path ttnn.max(x, dim=dim, keepdim=True) -> sub -> exp -> sum -> reciprocal -> mul on default interleaved tensors
